title: 6.5 Mode parameters
description: 完整 mode pages 定義：Read-Write Error Recovery、Verify Error Recovery、Caching、Rigid Disk Geometry、Flexible Disk、Format Device、Notch and Partition、Power Condition、Application Tag、Background Control、Logical Block Provisioning、IO Advice Hints Grouping、Background Operation Control mode page。設定 device behavior tuning 的控制介面。
